input_row.Description: Founded in 2020, Wintermute Ventures is a corporate venture arm of Wintermute based in London, United Kingdom. The firm seeks to invest in companies operating in trading platforms, credit platforms, middleware and tooling, gaming and NFTs, blockchain infrastructure, blockchain security, and asset management sectors.

input_row.Description: Founded in 2015, Jump Crypto is a corporate venture capital investment arm of Jump Trading based in Chicago, Illinois. The firm prefers to invest in companies operating in the crypto, web 3 infrastructure, and blockchain technology sectors.
